titleStmt.title: The Ambassador in the Soviet Union ( (Harriman) ) to the Secretary of State

div.head: The Ambassador in the Soviet Union ( Harriman ) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 2851. Press August 11 published Ulan Bator Tass despatch dated August 10 stating that in morning Maly Khural and Council of Ministers of Mongolian People’s Republic in joint session had unanimously taken decision for declaration of war on Japan by Mongolian People’s Republic.
